hero.subtitle: From brand activations to product launches, corporate events to exclusive invitations — we design every detail and bring it to life.

about.title: Built with Experience and Passion
about.body: As Temay, with deep industry experience gained over the years, we serve across a wide spectrum from event management to production, talent management to media. We aim for excellence in every project and turn our clients' dreams into reality.
about.years_tagline: Serving as a trusted name in the industry.

process.title: Systematic, Transparent, Results-Driven
process.subtitle: We apply the same disciplined process to every project — from your idea to the stage.

steps.title: Briefing & Needs Analysis
steps.desc: We listen carefully to your project, goals, and expectations. We ask the right questions to clarify your needs.

steps.title: Concept & Planning
steps.desc: We develop a concept tailored to your brand, prepare a budget plan and a detailed timeline.

steps.title: Production & Organization
steps.desc: We manage all vendors, technical teams, and logistics in a coordinated way, tracking every detail.

steps.title: Execution & Delivery
steps.desc: We provide professional on-site management on event day, delivering a seamless experience.

cta.title: Let's Bring Your Project to Life
cta.body: Tell us your idea and we'll handle the rest. We approach every project — big or small — with the same dedication.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From events to production, talent management to media — comprehensive and professional solutions in every area.

etkinlik-yonetimi.title: Event Management
etkinlik-yonetimi.short: From corporate conferences to brand activations, launches to private invitations — end-to-end event management.
etkinlik-yonetimi.description: We deliver strategic planning, meticulous logistics, and professional on-site operations under one roof. From your brief to the stage, we are your single point of contact — budget management, vendor coordination, crisis handling, and post-event analysis all included.

process.desc: We thoroughly assess your needs and expectations.
We prepare the concept, budget, and timeline.
All vendors and teams are managed in a coordinated manner.
Professional on-site management is provided on event day.

produksiyon.title: Production
produksiyon.short: Stage, sound, lighting, and visuals — world-class technical production.
produksiyon.description: We work with the industry's finest equipment and most experienced technical crew to add real production value to your events. From atmospheric lighting design to LED visual mapping, from immersive sound setups to custom stage structures — every technical detail becomes part of the experience.

process.desc: We analyze the technical requirements of your event.
Stage and technical infrastructure design is prepared.
Our professional team sets up all technical equipment.
Technical support is provided throughout the event.

menajerlik.title: Management
menajerlik.short: Career strategy and brand management for artists, athletes, and influencers.
menajerlik.description: We build sustainable career journeys by connecting talent with the right platforms, brands, and opportunities. From sponsorship negotiations to appearance scheduling, from brand partnerships to PR strategy — we offer a 360° talent management experience.

process.desc: We comprehensively evaluate talent and potential.
We develop a personalized career and brand strategy.
We seize opportunities and manage agreements.
We monitor and evaluate for continuous development.

ik-ekip-yonetimi.title: HR & Team Management
ik-ekip-yonetimi.short: Event staffing and corporate HR consulting.
ik-ekip-yonetimi.description: From rapidly assembling qualified event crews for large-scale productions to providing strategic HR consulting for corporate organizations — we place the right people in the right positions at the right time. We manage the entire lifecycle from onboarding and training to performance evaluation.

process.desc: We analyze your organization's needs in detail.
We develop a customized HR strategy.
We implement and track the processes.
We measure results and continuously improve.

media.title: Media
media.short: Event content, digital strategy, social media, and PR.
media.description: We amplify your event's digital footprint and strategically manage your brand's media presence. From live content capture to post-event campaigns, from influencer management to press relations — we maximize your brand's visibility across every channel.

process.desc: We evaluate your current media presence and goals.
We prepare a customized media strategy.
We produce quality content tailored to your target audience.
We manage publications and analyze performance.

ecr-etkinlik-bilgisayar.title: Teknoloji Kiralama
ecr-etkinlik-bilgisayar.short: Technology rental with 11,000+ products and logistics reaching all 81 provinces.
ecr-etkinlik-bilgisayar.description:
Founded in Istanbul in 2014, ECR Group is Turkey's leader in the technology rental sector. With over 10 years of experience and 8 distinct brands, we deliver end-to-end technology solutions to corporate clients.

With an inventory of over 11,000 products, our expert technical team, and a logistics network covering all 81 provinces of Turkey, we provide professional support for events and projects of any scale.
features: Inventory of 11,000+ products across a wide technology range
Logistics network covering all 81 provinces of Turkey
Expert technical installation and on-site support team
Continuous technical supervision throughout your event

process.desc: We identify your event's technical requirements and product needs together.
We select the most suitable technology from our 11,000+ product inventory.
Our expert team delivers, installs, and tests equipment at the venue.
We provide on-site technical support throughout the event for a seamless experience.

ecr-etkinlik-bilgisayar.subServices_subtitle: Professional solutions across rental, service, and event management.

subServices.desc: Laptop, tablet, computer and all IT equipment rental solutions.

subServices.desc: Long-term technology rental models for your corporate needs.

subServices.title: Event Rental
subServices.desc: Short-term equipment support for fairs, congresses, and all events.

subServices.title: Software Services
subServices.desc: Custom software solutions and technology integrations.

subServices.title: IT Services
subServices.desc: Corporate IT infrastructure and support services.

subServices.title: Registration Desk Services
subServices.desc: Hardware and technical personnel support for event registration.

subServices.title: VR Solutions
subServices.desc: End-to-end VR equipment services for virtual reality experiences.

subServices.title: E-Sports & Gaming
subServices.desc: Professional gaming hardware rental for e-sports tournaments.

subServices.title: Network
subServices.desc: Professional network infrastructure and management for event venues.

subServices.title: Technical Service
subServices.desc: Professional technical support for all your technology products.

subServices.title: VR Repair
subServices.desc: Expert repair, maintenance and spare parts service for VR devices.

subServices.title: Event Management
subServices.desc: Technology-focused event planning and operational support.

organizasyon-malzemeleri.title: Event Materials
organizasyon-malzemeleri.short: Corporate gift sets, promotional products, and event materials.
organizasyon-malzemeleri.description: We produce custom-designed gift sets, promotional products, and event materials that carry your brand's identity and the atmosphere of your event. From logo-printed products to premium packaging, from experience kits to printed materials — every item meets your brand's quality standard.

process.desc: We understand your campaign or event needs.
We prepare product designs suited to your brand.
We manage quality-controlled production process.
We ensure timely and complete delivery.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected works and case studies from our portfolio.

items.title: FIAT New Model Launch
items.goal: Introducing the new model to automotive journalists and dealer networks with a premium experience.
items.what: 500+ guest launch event; stage design, lighting choreography, media coordination, and VIP invitation management.
items.result: Covered by 35+ media outlets on event day. 2M+ organic social media reach achieved.

items.title: Sephora Experience Event
items.goal: Transforming Sephora's new collection into an immersive customer experience.
items.what: Interactive experience zones, influencer invitations, product demo stations, and live makeup shows.

items.title: HDI Insurance Annual Gala
items.goal: Annual gala event strengthening employee motivation and corporate belonging.
items.what: 300-person gala dinner, awards ceremony, stage production, music, and entertainment program.
items.result: Participant satisfaction survey returned 96% positive feedback.

items.title: Peugeot Test Drive Experience
items.goal: Introducing the new vehicle lineup to potential customers through a driving experience.
items.what: Custom test track setup, VIP invitation management, catering, and brand activation.
items.result: 150+ test drives completed, 40% lead conversion rate achieved.

items.title: ABB Technology Summit
items.goal: Conference and networking event bringing together industry stakeholders.
items.what: 2-day conference management; hall setup, technical infrastructure, translation services, and VIP transfers.

items.title: TJK Exclusive Race Day
items.goal: Delivering an unforgettable race day experience to select VIP guests.
items.what: VIP stand setup, exclusive catering, brand area installation, and guest coordination.
items.result: 100 VIP guests, 100% satisfaction and repeat event request.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: As Temay Events, we produce with passion.
about.story_title: Started with Passion, Grown with Experience
about.story_body:
Temay was founded with a deep passion for the world of events. With the experience gained over the years and our strong team, we have become one of the trusted names in the industry. We aim for excellence in every event, every production, every project.

We work day and night to turn our clients' dreams into reality, meticulously planning and executing every detail. We serve with the same dedication and professionalism at every scale, from small celebrations to large corporate events.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We aim for the highest quality standards in every project.

values.title: Reliability
values.desc: We keep our promises and deliver on time and completely.

values.title: Creativity
values.desc: We produce innovative and original solutions in every project.

values.title: Teamwork
values.desc: We work together with our clients to achieve success.
